statement.en: Strategic Leadership and Digital Transformation: The Role of Top Management Team Power, Compensation, and Turnover in Chinese Listed Firms

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (arXiv 2026 dated) proposing empirical relationships between TMT characteristics (power, compensation, turnover) and digital transformation outcomes in Chinese firms. The causal mechanisms and moderating effects described are provisional—not yet peer-reviewed or validated against competing theories. The work operates in the FLOWING state: testable but not yet established.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 経営陣の権力と報酬の積に離職率を加えると、デジタル変革の深さが現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 頂点から下降する権力が二股に分かれ、下層で新しい流れが生まれる変容の幾何学。
